reasoning: The forecast asks whether Ian Nepomniachtchi's Elo rating on Wikipedia will be 1% higher than his rating on April 13, 2025. The official Wikipedia rating on April 13 will be his April 1 rating of 2757. A 1% increase requires him to reach 2785. Gaining 28 Elo points for a top-10 player is incredibly difficult and requires a massive winning streak (approximately +6 or +7 in strong tournaments). For the first resolution date (April 20), Wikipedia will still show the April 1 list, making resolution YES virtually impossible. For subsequent dates, he would need exceptional performances over a few months. Given he is capable of such peaks but currently not near that rating, the base probability is low but grows slightly with longer time horizons due to increased variance and opportunities to play.
